title_cn: 摩根大通在法庭文件中否认前副总裁的病毒骚扰指控

title: Epstein-Related Probes Continue, Federal Agencies Say
title_cn: 联邦机构表示，与爱泼斯坦有关的调查仍在继续
summary: Two people familiar with the matter told FOIA Files millions of pages of files that were withheld relate to other investigations in which Epstein was not the primary target.

title: UAE Urges Iran Talks, Stocks on Win Streak, Consumer Record Low
title_cn: 阿联酋敦促伊朗谈判，股市连涨，消费者创历史新低
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: S&P 500 Bulls Power Longest Weekly Gain Since 2023: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 标普 500 指数多头有望创下 2023 年以来最长周涨幅：市场总结
summary: Hopes for a deal between the US and Iran that will turn a fragile ceasefire into lasting peace fueled Wall Street optimism, driving stocks to their longest streak of weekly gains since 2023.

title: Gold Drops as Fed’s Waller Says Next Move Likely To Be Rate Hike
title_cn: 美联储沃勒称下一步行动可能是加息，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as traders ramped up bets on Federal Reserve monetary tightening after Governor Christopher Waller warned the Iran war’s energy shock could fuel inflation.

title: Muni Bond Sales Surge in 2026
title_cn: 2026 年市政债券销售激增
summary: Bloomberg's Aashah Shah joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." May has been a strong month for muni bond issuance, with about $35 billion of sales so far this year. This month has seen the most debt for a similar period in May since at least 2015, Bloomberg data show. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Entry Points Incredibly Attractive: Steinbach
title_cn: 信用切入点极具吸引力：斯坦巴赫
summary: Margaret Steinbach, fixed income director at Capital Group, and Warren Pierson, co-chief investment officer of the Baird Funds, join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Junk debt is beating just about everything else in fixed-income markets after surging yields wiped out gains on most other bonds. Yet with high-yield credit spreads near two-decade lows, investor unease is building. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Swings With Market Focused on US-Iran Peace Prospects
title_cn: 市场关注美伊和平前景，油价波动
summary: Oil swung between gains and losses as traders assessed the outlook for a peace deal to end the Iran war.

title: New York Tax on NYC Cash Home Purchases Close to Collapsing
title_cn: 纽约现金购房税接近崩溃
summary: Bloomberg's Nacha Cattan joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." A proposal to levy a new tax on all-cash real estate transactions over $1 million in New York City is likely to be dropped from the state budget, according to people familiar with the negotiations.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Retail’s K-Shaped Economy
title_cn: 零售业的 K 型经济
summary:
Inflation is exposing a major divide in the US economy according to Citi Retailing and Hardlines Analyst Steven Zaccone, He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why wealthy consumers keep spending while lower-income shoppers struggle with rising gas and living costs. From Walmart and BJ’s to Williams-Sonoma and AutoZone, we look at the retail winners and losers in today’s “K-shaped” economy.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Most Hawkish Fed Nominee in 20 Years: Desai
title_cn: 沃什：德赛 20年来最鹰派的美联储候选人
summary: Sonal Desai, CIO of Franklin Templeton Fixed Income, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Kevin Warsh, who has promised the biggest shakeup in decades at the US central bank, was sworn into office Friday in a White House ceremony as the 17th chair of the Fed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Long Bond Yields Hit Highest in Almost Two Decades
title_cn: 全球长期债券收益率创近二十年来最高
summary: Subadra Rajappa, head of US rates strategy at Société Générale, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The selloff in longer-maturity government bonds has pushed up yields to levels last seen during the global financial crisis, and market participants are warning the move has room to run. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Director of National Intelligence Chief Gabbard Is Stepping Down
title_cn: 国家情报总监加巴德即将辞职
summary: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she is resigning to help her husband fight a rare form of bone cancer. Her last day is expected to be on June 30. She's been increasingly out of step with the White House because of her anti-war views. Bloomberg's Jeff Mason reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Traders Bet Fed Under Warsh Will Hike Rates This Year
title_cn: 债券交易商押注沃什领导下的美联储今年将加息
summary: Bond traders are fully pricing in an interest-rate hike by the Federal Reserve this year, a sign of conviction in the market that Chair Kevin Warsh will need to move quickly to combat inflation.

title: SEC Delays Plan Allowing for Crypto Versions of US Stocks
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会推迟允许美国股票加密版本的计划
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission is delaying a plan to provide broad exemptions for US crypto firms to trade tokenized assets linked to stocks, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Jet Fuel’s War Surge Vindicates Airlines That Hedged
title_cn: 喷气燃料的战争激增证明航空公司的对冲是正确的
summary: The surge in the cost of jet fuel since the start of the Iran war is highlighting the vast disparity in how well individual airlines protect themselves against a price spike.

title: US Oil Rig Count Up by Most in Four Years Amid Drilling Recovery
title_cn: 随着钻井恢复，美国石油钻机数量四年来最多
summary: The number of rigs drilling in the US shale patch rose by the most in more than four years, the latest sign of a resurgence in domestic activity as the war in Iran drives up oil prices.

title: Dollar Stalls as Hope for US-Iran Peace Boosts Risk Sentiment
title_cn: 美伊和平希望提振风险情绪，美元停滞
summary: The dollar is set to end the week nearly unchanged as risk assets got a boost tied to optimism around progress in peace talks between the US and Iran.

title: Kevin Warsh Sworn In As Fed Chair | Real Yield 5/22/2026
title_cn: 凯文·沃什宣誓就任美联储主席|实际收益率 5/22/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Societe Generale Americas Head of Research Subadra Rajappa, Franklin Templeton Fixed Income CIO Sonal Desai, Capital Group Fixed Income Asset Class Lead Margaret Steinbach, and Baird Funds Co-Chief Investment Officer Warren Pierson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zoom Jumps on Sales Forecast Topping Estimates
title_cn: Zoom 销售预测突破预期
summary: Shares of Zoom jumped after the company raised its full-year forecast for both adjusted earnings and revenue, prompting an upgrade at KeyBanc and higher price targets at both RBC and Baird. Zoom CFO Michelle Chang joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kevin Warsh Sworn in as New Federal Reserve Chair
title_cn: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 宣誓就任新任美联储主席
summary: Kevin Warsh was sworn in as the 17th chair of the federal reserve in a ceremony at the White House Friday. Speaking after taking his oath, Warsh called it the 'honor of a lifetime' to re-enter public service and promised that he will lead a 'reform-oriented' Fed.  Despite fears around Fed independence, President Trump told Warsh to 'just do your own thing and do a great job.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Rises as Traders Track Peace Talks and Pull of US Premium
title_cn: 随着交易商跟踪和平谈判和美国溢价的拉动，铜价上涨
summary: Copper advanced as traders assessed the prospect of a Middle East peace deal and the pull of a premium for the metal in the US.

title: SEC Delays Prediction Market ETFs From Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise
title_cn: SEC 推迟 Roundhill、GraniteShares 和 Bitwise 的预测市场 ETF
summary: Upstart fund issuers raced to wrap election and recession bets into tickers. Then the regulator stepped in.

title: Stocks Eye Longest Weekly Run Since 2023 | Open Interest 5/22/2026
title_cn: 股市有望创 2023 年以来最长周线走势 |未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 22 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks ride AI optimism toward their longest winning streak since 2023, while hopes for a US and Iran peace deal lift markets. SpaceX delays a key Starship test after filing for a record IPO. Plus, Christopher Waller’s inflation warning, Axon’s AI push, the future of fintech, retail’s K-shaped economy, and Chrysler’s affordability pivot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Puig Falls After Estee Lauder Deal Fails
title_cn: 雅诗兰黛交易失败后普伊格下跌
summary: Puig Brands plunged on Friday following the collapse of a proposed combination with Estee Lauder Cos. that would have created one of the world’s largest fragrance and skincare companies. Deborah Aitken, Bloomberg Intelligence Luxury Goods Analyst discussed the merger with Scarlet Fu and Isabelle Lee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Futu, Up Fintech Options Surged Before Crackdown Sparked Slump
title_cn: 富途、Up 金融科技选项在打击行动引发低迷之前激增
summary: Trading in US-listed options on Futu Holdings Ltd. and Up Fintech Holding Ltd. surged just before China’s regulator’s announcement that it planned to penalize them triggered a record share slump.

title: Uber Said to Study Full Takeover of Germany’s Delivery Hero
title_cn: 据称 Uber 正在研究全面收购德国送货英雄
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is exploring options for a full takeover of Delivery Hero SE, people familiar with the matter said, a move that would help it better compete with DoorDash Inc. outside the US.

title: Trafigura Withdraws Huge Volumes of Copper From LME Warehouses
title_cn: 托克从 LME 仓库提取大量铜
summary: Trafigura Group has moved to withdraw hundreds of millions of dollars of copper from London Metal Exchange warehouses as lucrative trading opportunities emerge in the US and China, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: FBI Prepares for Increasing Drone Threats Disrupting World Cup
title_cn: 联邦调查局准备应对日益严重的无人机威胁，扰乱世界杯
summary:
The FBI plans to deploy roughly 60 specially trained state and local police officers across venues for the FIFA World Cup to detect and electronically disable hostile drones as security officials warn that threats once associated with foreign battlefields are increasingly possible inside the US. Myles Miller reports

Original filename: FBI_WorldCup_Drone_Social_V4.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EM Stocks, Currencies Head for Weekly Gain as Peace Hopes Grow
title_cn: 随着和平希望的增强，新兴市场股票和货币将每周上涨
summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies are heading for a weekly gain as investors keep buying artificial intelligence-related shares and on growing hopes that the US and Iran may be moving closer to a peace deal.

title: Flight Firm CAE Says Defense Deals, Cost Cutting to Drive Profit Surge
title_cn: 飞行公司 CAE 表示，国防交易和成本削减将推动利润激增
summary: Shares of CAE Inc. slipped the most in over three years after the flight simulator firm unveiled a plan to increase operating income by 30% or more by 2030 under a strategy that includes a greater focus on defense clients.

title: AI-Fueled Rally Puts S&P 500 on Track for Eighth Weekly Gain
title_cn: 人工智能推动的反弹使标准普尔 500 指数有望连续第八周上涨
summary: US stocks advanced as investors struck an upbeat tone ahead of a long holiday weekend, with optimism fueled by hopes for resolution of hostilities in the Middle East and relentless enthusiasm for artificial intelligence-linked trades.

title: Central Africa States Rule Out CFA Franc Devaluation, Governor Says
title_cn: 中部非洲国家州长称非洲金融共同体法郎不会贬值
summary: Central African countries have no plans to devalue their common currency despite economic pressure caused by weak growth and low foreign-exchange reserves, according to Bank of Central African States Governor Yvon Sana Bangui.

title: AI Film ‘Critterz’ Looks for Tech Partner After OpenAI
title_cn: 继 OpenAI 之后，人工智能电影《Critterz》寻找技术合作伙伴
summary: Critterz, a feature-length cartoon intended to showcase how OpenAI’s video-generation capabilities could revolutionize filmmaking, has missed a planned Cannes Film Festival debut after the artificial intelligence company shut down its Sora tool, forcing its creators to look for a new AI partner.

title: Anthropic to Close Over $30 Billion Round as Soon as Next Week
title_cn: Anthropic 最快下周完成超过 300 亿美元的融资
summary: Anthropic PBC is set to close its latest round of funding, which may top $30 billion at a valuation above $900 billion, as soon as next week, according to people familiar with the matter, vaulting ahead of rival OpenAI to become the world’s most valuable AI startup.

title: The Rise of AI Public Safety
title_cn: 人工智能公共安全的兴起
summary:
Axon President Josh Isner joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is misunderstanding the company’s AI strategy. From  drones to enterprise security and public safety software, Isner says Axon is evolving far beyond Tasers and body cameras, and betting aggressively on AI to drive its next wave of growth.
Correction: Corrects the name of a guest in the description. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron CEO on Expanding US Chip Production, Memory Demand
title_cn: 美光首席执行官谈扩大美国芯片产量和内存需求
summary: Micron President and CEO Sanjay Mehrotra discusses the company's significant expansion of DRAM manufacturing in the US. Speaking with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall, Mehrotra highlights the importance of this advanced memory technology for critical sectors such as automotive, aerospace, defense, industrial and networking. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: House Panel to Probe Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 众议院小组将调查预测市场的内幕交易
summary: The House Oversight Committee is investigating how customers of Kalshi and Polymarket could be using non-public information to engage in insider trading, escalating concerns about prediction markets after some suspiciously well timed trades.

title: Goldman's Kaplan on Warsh as Fed Chair, Rates and AI
title_cn: 高盛卡普兰谈沃什担任美联储主席、利率和人工智能
summary: Robert Kaplan, Goldman Sachs vice chair and former president of the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas, expects Kevin Warsh to be an "excellent" Fed chair. Speaking with Julie Fine, Kaplan also discusses the shift in market expectations over the past eight weeks, from anticipating a rate cut later in the year to now considering a possible rate increase or no change due to persistent inflation and elevated oil prices. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Halts Starship Launch, Lenovo Soars on AI Growth | Bloomberg Tech 5/22/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 停止星际飞船发射，联想因人工智能增长而飙升 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down what comes next after a critical Starship launch was scrubbed, and he discusses what that means for the space company's planned mega IPO with a SpaceX alumni and an early investor. Plus, an exclusive conversation with Lenovo CFO Winston Cheng after the world-leading PC maker soars post-earnings on strong AI growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lenovo CFO Weighs In on Strong AI Growth
title_cn: 联想首席财务官谈人工智能的强劲增长
summary: Shares of Lenovo soared in Hong Kong trading Friday after the company reported strong growth in AI-related earnings, offsetting challenges from rising component prices. Winston Cheng, CFO of Lenovo, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Comes Next After SpaceX Halts Starship Launch
title_cn: SpaceX 停止星舰发射后接下来会发生什么
summary: SpaceX delayed a critical test of its massive Starship rocket after a pin tied to the launch tower mechanism failed to retract during the final countdown. The setback comes just a day after the company formally filed for an IPO. Laura Crabtree, CEO of Epsilon3 and former SpaceX engineer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Could Earn $760 Billion From His SpaceX Pay Packages
title_cn: 马斯克可以从他的 SpaceX 薪酬中赚取 7600 亿美元
summary: Elon Musk is making a habit of collecting 12-figure compensation packages.

title: Bill Winters ‘Lower-Value Human’ Apology Not Enough for Unions
title_cn: 比尔·温特斯的“低价值人类”道歉对工会来说还不够
summary: Bill Winters’ efforts to restore calm after making some controversial comments on AI have failed to reassure labor organizations, according to one of the world’s largest union federations.

title: Are Fintech Apps Already Dead?
title_cn: 金融科技应用程序已经死了吗？
summary: Is it the end of fintech and investing apps as we know it? Atomic Invest CEO David Dindi joins Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about the future of finance and why it belongs to AI companions, not apps. He says investing apps could disappear within a decade as AI assistants manage portfolios for consumers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zoom Soars After Expansion Into New Products Begins to Pay Off
title_cn: 进军新产品并开始获得回报后，Zoom 股价飙升
summary: Zoom Communications Inc. shares surged as much as 18% after the company projected stronger-than-anticipated sales growth and said that customers are paying for its expanded suite of office products.

title: UK’s Softcat Recasts Itself as AI Winner With Guidance Upgrade
title_cn: 英国 Softcat 通过指导升级将自己重塑为人工智能赢家
summary: Softcat Plc’s image among investors is quickly shifting from AI loser to AI winner.

title: Why Did Sustainable Fashion Brand Everlane Sell to Shein?
title_cn: 为什么可持续时尚品牌 Everlane 出售给 Shein？
summary:
Chinese fast-fashion brand Shein is known for churning out thousands of youth-friendly styles daily at low prices. Over the past few years, the e-commerce giant has been scrutinized for its environmental impact, as well as its production practices. So why is Shein buying sustainable fashion retailer Everlane, known for its “radical transparency?"

Lauren Sherman, fashion correspondent at Puck, joins Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin to unpack the story behind the acquisition. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Norway’s $2.3 Trillion Fund Objects to Elkann’s Meta Board Seat
title_cn: 挪威 2.3 万亿美元基金反对埃尔坎担任 Meta 董事会席位
summary: Norway’s $2.3 trillion wealth fund expressed dissatisfaction with the reappointment of John Elkann, chairman of Stellantis NV and chief executive of investor Exor NV, on the board of directors at Meta Platforms Inc.

title: Wingtech Sues Nexperia at China Court Over Dutch Control Dispute
title_cn: 闻泰科技就荷兰控制权纠纷向中国法院起诉Nexperia
summary: China’s Wingtech Technology Co. sued Nexperia and related parties in a Chinese court, seeking at least 8 billion yuan ($1.2 billion) in damages and restoration of control over its Dutch chipmaking unit.

title: NYSE's Martin Questions Some Rules Used to Attract SpaceX to Nasdaq
title_cn: 纽约证券交易所的马丁对吸引 SpaceX 登陆纳斯达克的一些规则提出质疑
summary: NYSE President Lynn Martin says some of the rules used to attract SpaceX to go public on the Nasdaq are "questionable." She says "market integrity" is not a "competitive dynamic." Martin says it's been a good year for IPOs across all industries and they're working to bring more companies public. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Eutelsat Stock Takes Off as SpaceX IPO Triggers Satellite Rally
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股引发卫星反弹，欧洲通信卫星公司股价飙升
summary: Shares in Eutelsat Communications are headed for their best week in nearly a year, as enthusiasm over the highly anticipated initial public offering of Elon Musk’s SpaceX spurs investor flows into the sector.

title: Amazon’s Jassy Sees Company’s Breadth as a Strength
title_cn: 亚马逊的 Jassy 将公司的广度视为一种优势
summary: Few companies serve as many consumers and businesses

title: China’s AI-Made Video Is Changing the Entertainment Landscape
title_cn: 中国人工智能视频正在改变娱乐格局
summary: Such services pose an existential threat to traditional entertainment.

title: Zara Owner Inditex’s CEO Bets on Diversification, AI for Growth
title_cn: Zara 所有者 Inditex 首席执行官押注多元化和人工智能促进增长
summary: Zara owner Inditex SA is banking on diversification across brands and countries as well as artificial intelligence to spur growth at the world’s largest listed retailer, Chief Executive Officer Óscar García Maceiras said.

title: DeepSeek Founder Avows AGI Goal Ahead of $10 Billion Funding
title_cn: DeepSeek 创始人在 100 亿美元融资之前宣布 AGI 目标
summary: DeepSeek’s senior management has told potential investors in its ongoing 70 billion yuan ($10 billion) funding round that the startup will prioritize groundbreaking AI research over short-term commercialization, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Samsung Chip Workers Face Colleagues’ Resentment Over Bonus Deal
title_cn: 三星芯片工人面临同事对奖金交易的不满
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. staved off a potentially catastrophic strike this week, reaching a tentative deal with leaders of its largest union at the last minute to share more profits from the AI boom. But inside the $1.1 trillion technology behemoth, not everyone is happy.

title: BlackRock's Li Sees Earnings Momentum Driven by AI
title_cn: 贝莱德李嘉诚认为人工智能将推动盈利增长
summary: BlackRock Chief Investment Strategist Wei Li says artificial intelligence is driving a lot of the major earnings upgrades in equity markets. "We can look at AI lifting the whole market, but identifying where the bottlenecks are is a good active play," Li tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Touts AI Promise Over Reality in SaaSpocalypse Fight
title_cn: Salesforce 在 SaaS 末日之战中宣扬人工智能的承诺而非现实
summary: Patients at the University of Chicago Medicine featured in a promotional video seamlessly refill prescriptions, book appointments and even get parking tips with the help of Agentforce, Salesforce Inc.’s flagship AI tool.

title: Randstad CEO on AI & Future of Work
title_cn: 任仕达首席执行官谈人工智能和未来工作
summary:
Sander van ’t Noordende, CEO of recruitment giant Randstad, says their base case is that 7-8% of jobs will be replaced by artificial intelligence over the next 5 to 10 years. However, Van ‘t Noordende says he does not see the "doomsday scenario" that some predict.

In an interview on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on May 21, van ‘t Noordende said AI will be a "wave" over the next decade, but also presents many opportunities, enabling many workers to be more productive, and requires massive infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: StanChart CEO Apologizes for ‘Lower-Value Human’ Comments
title_cn: 渣打银行首席执行官为“低价值人类”言论道歉
summary: Standard Chartered Plc Chief Executive Officer Bill Winters apologized for his comments earlier this week about how artificial intelligence will affect “lower-value human capital,” after such remarks spurred public backlash.

title: EU-Anthropic Talks Over Mythos Concerns Are Stalled, Spain Says
title_cn: 西班牙表示，欧盟与人类关于神话问题的谈判陷入僵局
summary: The European Union has made little progress in talks with Anthropic PBC to get its banks and companies tested for digital vulnerabilities that the new Mythos AI model uncovers, Spain’s economy minister said.

title: BNP Paribas Asks Appeals Court to Toss Sudan Abuse Verdict
title_cn: 法国巴黎银行要求上诉法院推翻苏丹虐待判决
summary: BNP Paribas SA asked a federal appeals court to reverse a verdict of nearly $21 million against the bank over allegations that it funded a regime in Sudan that committed widespread human rights abuses.

title: Trump to Make Foreigners Leave US to Apply for Green Cards
title_cn: 特朗普将要求外国人离开美国申请绿卡
summary: Foreigners seeking permanent residency in the US will now have to leave the country to apply for green cards.

title: Abrego Garcia Human-Smuggling Case Dismissed by Tennessee Judge
title_cn: 田纳西州法官驳回阿布雷戈·加西亚人口走私案
summary: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed the human-smuggling case against Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, a Salvadoran migrant, after concluding the government had brought the case as retaliation for his legal fight against being deported.

title: Warsh Sworn In As Fed Chair | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/22/2026
title_cn: 沃什宣誓就任美联储主席 |权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 22 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses Kevin Warsh's swearing-in as the next Chair of the Federal Reserve. On today's show, Kpler Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk Michelle Brouhard, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Friday Reporter Public Affairs Founder Lisa Camooso Miller, Goldman Sachs Vice Chairman Rob Kaplan and Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-Columbia Student to Ask Supreme Court to Stop Deportation
title_cn: 前哥伦比亚学生请求最高法院停止驱逐出境
summary: A Columbia University graduate student detained by US authorities over his role in pro-Palestinian protests will ask the US Supreme Court to halt his deportation after a federal appeals court rejected his request for a re-hearing.

title: Micron CEO Sees Memory Chip Shortage Lasting Beyond 2026
title_cn: 美光首席执行官预计内存芯片短缺将持续到 2026 年之后
summary: Sanjay Mehrotra, President, Chairman and CEO of Micron joined Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall to discuss the company's significant expansion of DRAM manufacturing in the US. He also discussed the demand for AI, and how he sees memory chip shortage lasting beyond 2026.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bolsonaro Falls Behind Lula After Link to Scandal-Plagued Banker
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗在与丑闻缠身的银行家有联系后落后于卢拉
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva is leading Brazil’s presidential election as Senator Flavio Bolsonaro suffers from his ties to the man at the center of a massive banking scandal, a new poll showed.

title: Trump Tells Warsh to Do ‘Own Thing’ as Fed Chair Sworn In
title_cn: 特朗普要求沃什在美联储主席宣誓就职后做“自己的事”
summary: Goldman Sachs Vice Chairman Rob Kaplan, a former Dallas Fed president, spoke with Julie Fine after Kevin Warsh was sworn in as Fed Chair. Kaplan said he expects newly sworn-in Fed Chair Kevin Warsh will be independent from political influence, which is essential for the central bank to maintain credibility  with the public and markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE Joins Saudis, Qatar in Urging Trump Not to Restart War
title_cn: 阿联酋与沙特、卡塔尔一起敦促特朗普不要重启战争
summary: The United Arab Emirates has made a more concerted push for an end to the Iran war in recent days, joining Saudi Arabia and Qatar in urging US President Donald Trump to give negotiations a chance, according to several people familiar with the matter. Michelle Brouhard, Head of Policy and Geopolitical Risk at Kpler joins Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Saps US Military Ahead of Any Potential China Conflict
title_cn: 在任何潜在的中国冲突之前，伊朗战争削弱了美国的军事实力
summary: A top Pentagon official’s remarks that the US had halted arms sales to Taiwan to ensure sufficient munitions for the Iran war are the latest sign that the conflict has sapped American military readiness, including for a potential confrontation with China.

title: Gabbard to Resign as Trump’s Spy Chief After Awkward Tenure
title_cn: 加巴德在尴尬的任期后辞去特朗普的间谍头子职务
summary: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, whose anti-war views spurred tension with the White House, said she was resigning from the post to help her husband confront a bone-cancer diagnosis.

title: Debt Investors Press Quebec Finance Minister on Separatism in Canada
title_cn: 债务投资者就加拿大的分裂主义向魁北克财政部长施压
summary: Canada is dealing with active separatist movements in two of its largest provinces, sparking wariness among bondholders in the US, according to Quebec’s finance minister.

title: Denmark Government Talks Stall, Improving Frederiksen’s Odds
title_cn: 丹麦政府谈判陷入僵局，增加了弗雷德里克森的胜算
summary: The leader of Denmark’s Liberal Party failed to form a government in record-long coalition talks, potentially handing caretaker Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen a renewed chance to secure a third term in office.

title: Top Pakistan Mediator in Iran Amid Hints of Peace Talks Progress
title_cn: 和平谈判取得进展的迹象中巴基斯坦高级调解员在伊朗
summary: Pakistan’s army chief, the favored interlocutor between Washington and Tehran, arrived in the Iranian capital amid signals of progress in talks to end the war.

title: Ireland Aims to Join Next Phase of Flagship EU Defense Loan Fund
title_cn: 爱尔兰计划加入下一阶段旗舰欧盟国防贷款基金
summary: Ireland is seeking to join the next phase of the EU’s flagship defense program as the country steps up spending on security and defense.

title: Trump Tells Warsh to Do ‘Own Thing’ as Fed Chair Sworn In
title_cn: 特朗普要求沃什在美联储主席宣誓就职后做“自己的事”
summary: President Donald Trump stressed that he wants Kevin Warsh to independently lead the Federal Reserve, as he looked to downplay investor concern that he would pressure the new central bank chief on policy decisions.

title: Warsh Says He'll Lead a 'Reform-Oriented' Fed
title_cn: 沃什称他将领导一个“以改革为导向”的美联储
summary: Kevin Warsh says he'll lead a "reform-oriented" Federal Reserve and goals will be pursued with "independence and resolve." In the months leading up to his nomination, Warsh said the Fed was not lowering rates enough. He speaks during the ceremony at the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Progress in Iran Talks Undercut Over Uranium, Tolls
title_cn: 伊朗谈判取得进展削弱了铀矿和通行费
summary: Iran said the latest proposal from the US partly bridged the gap between the warring sides, but comments from the Islamic Republic’s supreme leader about keeping Tehran’s uranium stockpile and a dispute over tolls in the Strait of Hormuz clouded the outlook for a breakthrough.

title: German Government Balking at Price for Pre-IPO Stake in Tankmaker KNDS
title_cn: 德国政府对 Tankmaker KNDS 首次公开募股前的股份犹豫不决
summary: Germany is balking at terms for taking a proposed 40% stake in tank maker KNDS NV, in a bid to limit how much the government pays for its share, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Kevin Warsh Sworn In as 17th Federal Reserve Chair
title_cn: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 宣誓就任第 17 任美联储主席
summary: Kevin Warsh was sworn into office as the 17th chair of the Fed, promising the biggest shakeup in decades at the US central bank, and takes over at a tense moment for the economy and the central bank. Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas administered the oath at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Says US’s Latest Proposal Has ‘Narrowed the Gaps’
title_cn: 伊朗称美国的最新提议“缩小了差距”
summary: Iran said the latest proposal from the US has partly bridged the gap between the warring sides, as they seek to turn a fragile ceasefire into a peace deal.

title: Wyden, Finance Panel Democrats Seek Investigation of DOJ Fund
title_cn: 怀登和财务小组民主党人寻求对司法部基金进行调查
summary: Democrats on the Senate Finance Committee called on chairman Mike Crapo (R-Idaho) Friday to launch a bipartisan probe into the Justice Department’s new fund for victims of government weaponization.

title: Trump Tells Warsh to 'Do Your Own Thing' at Fed
title_cn: 特朗普告诉沃什在美联储“做你自己的事”
summary: President Donald Trump says no one in the US is better prepared to lead the Federal Reserve than Kevin Warsh as he swears Warsh in at the White House as the 17th chair of the Fed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Turkey’s PoliticalDrama Means forErdogan and Markets
title_cn: 土耳其的政治戏剧对埃尔多安和市场意味着什么
summary:
A Turkish court decision to remove the leadership of the country’s main opposition party caused the main index to tumble to its lowest in six weeks, then reverse losses within the day.

Murat Oztaskin explains what this could mean for markets and longtime president, Recep Tayyip Erdogan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ken Griffin Gives $5 Million to GOP in First Midterm Donation
title_cn: 肯·格里芬 (Ken Griffin) 首次向共和党捐赠 500 万美元中期捐款
summary: Ken Griffin, one of the biggest political donors in recent election cycles, has made his first federal contribution for the 2026 midterm races.

title: NATO-Russia War Simulation Exposes UK Defense Spending Gap
title_cn: 北约-俄罗斯战争模拟暴露了英国国防开支缺口
summary: Huddled on a disused underground train platform in central London, hundreds of British soldiers played out their response to a fictional Russian attack on NATO, chewing through terabytes of data every day to direct fictional assets, including drones and robots, against the invasion.

title: Putin Vows Response After Saying Six Died in College Strike
title_cn: 普京称大学罢工造成六人死亡后誓言做出回应
summary: President Vladimir Putin ordered defense officials to prepare what he said were options for retaliation after he accused Ukraine of attacking a college in the Russian-occupied Luhansk region, killing at least six people.

title: South Africa President to Appeal Against Farm Cash Report Monday
title_cn: 南非总统周一对农业现金报告提出上诉
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa’s legal team plans to file court papers early next week seeking a review of an independent panel’s report that found he may have breached the constitution in his handling of a burglary at his game farm.

title: Trump Gets Another Ally in EU With Jansa’s Return in Slovenia
title_cn: 随着扬萨重返斯洛文尼亚，特朗普在欧盟获得了另一个盟友
summary: Slovenian lawmakers elected nationalist leader Janez Jansa as the country’s next premier, tilting another European Union member to the right and handing Donald Trump a potential ally in the bloc.
